records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... ahh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... ahh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... ahh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: My beloved... my little sister...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My beloved... my little sister...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My beloved... my little sister...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No matter how many times you fire, it's useless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No matter how many times you fire, it's useless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No matter how many times you fire, it's useless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sisters will block every one of your bullets for my sake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sisters will block every one of your bullets for my sake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sisters will block every one of your bullets for my sake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion. Back then, you sacrificed your Apostles in your place too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion. Back then, you sacrificed your Apostles in your place too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion. Back then, you sacrificed your Apostles in your place too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back then, you suffered terribly because of it... but now you don't seem to feel anything at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back then, you suffered terribly because of it... but now you don't seem to feel anything at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back then, you suffered terribly because of it... but now you don't seem to feel anything at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The me of now does not make foolish mistakes like that anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The me of now does not make foolish mistakes like that anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The me of now does not make foolish mistakes like that anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because you abandoned your love for them...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because you abandoned your love for them...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because you abandoned your love for them...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Abandoned it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Abandoned it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Abandoned it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was taken from me. Didn't the demon you left behind tell you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was taken from me. Didn't the demon you left behind tell you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was taken from me. Didn't the demon you left behind tell you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I took it back. To open the Qliphoth Game, I needed my whole self. Unbroken and complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I took it back. To open the Qliphoth Game, I needed my whole self. Unbroken and complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I took it back. To open the Qliphoth Game, I needed my whole self. Unbroken and complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Momo... is your Fragment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Momo... is your Fragment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Momo... is your Fragment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. As a part of my heart, she is inside here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. As a part of my heart, she is inside here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. As a part of my heart, she is inside here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's been desperately searching for you all this time, but now she's quiet. She's hiding because she's afraid you might hesitate to shoot me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's been desperately searching for you all this time, but now she's quiet. She's hiding because she's afraid you might hesitate to shoot me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's been desperately searching for you all this time, but now she's quiet. She's hiding because she's afraid you might hesitate to shoot me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That's wrong...! This is not Momo! It is a Fragment of Thagirion!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That's wrong...! This is not Momo! It is a Fragment of Thagirion!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That's wrong...! This is not Momo! It is a Fragment of Thagirion!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Because a child named Morgana died too early...! Gremory made that Fragment parasitize the child's soul to keep her alive...!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Because a child named Morgana died too early...! Gremory made that Fragment parasitize the child's soul to keep her alive...!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Because a child named Morgana died too early...! Gremory made that Fragment parasitize the child's soul to keep her alive...!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Momo?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Momo?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Momo?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The child called Momo never met Nicole in the first place...! The one who's been living beside Nicole all this time was the villain Thagirion...! Nicole was deceived from the very beginning...! If Nicole pities such a villain and refuses to shoot...!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The child called Momo never met Nicole in the first place...! The one who's been living beside Nicole all this time was the villain Thagirion...! Nicole was deceived from the very beginning...! If Nicole pities such a villain and refuses to shoot...!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The child called Momo never met Nicole in the first place...! The one who's been living beside Nicole all this time was the villain Thagirion...! Nicole was deceived from the very beginning...! If Nicole pities such a villain and refuses to shoot...!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Then Nicole is a fool...!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Then Nicole is a fool...!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Then Nicole is a fool...!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So she says.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So she says.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So she says.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Isn't that clumsy little sense of self-sacrifice just adorable?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Isn't that clumsy little sense of self-sacrifice just adorable?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Isn't that clumsy little sense of self-sacrifice just adorable?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must not hesitate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must not hesitate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must not hesitate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you mistake the Demon Lord for your friend just because you spent a little time with her...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you mistake the Demon Lord for your friend just because you spent a little time with her...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you mistake the Demon Lord for your friend just because you spent a little time with her...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That mistake will return as a blade and pierce you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That mistake will return as a blade and pierce you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That mistake will return as a blade and pierce you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole... I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole... I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole... I'm sorry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Momo will behave nicely...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Momo will behave nicely...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Momo will behave nicely...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get juice on my own...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get juice on my own...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get juice on my own...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please don't hate me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please don't hate me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please don't hate me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Demon Lord Thagirion...!!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Demon Lord Thagirion...!!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Demon Lord Thagirion...!!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Judgment!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Judgment!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Judgment!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pfft.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pfft.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pfft.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The bullet... missed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The bullet... missed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The bullet... missed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. That's not it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. That's not it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. That's not it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry... Momo.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry... Momo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry... Momo.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't hate you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't hate you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't hate you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will stay with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will stay with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will stay with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that you don't get hurt and cry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that you don't get hurt and cry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that you don't get hurt and cry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to protect you from now on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to protect you from now on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to protect you from now on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you... hate me if I cried in front of you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you... hate me if I cried in front of you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you... hate me if I cried in front of you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll just... hold you tighter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll just... hold you tighter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll just... hold you tighter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To fall to your knees because of your emotions. You really are just like that woman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To fall to your knees because of your emotions. You really are just like that woman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To fall to your knees because of your emotions. You really are just like that woman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose that's what fate is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose that's what fate is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose that's what fate is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well then... goodbye.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well then... goodbye.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well then... goodbye.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thagirion!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thagirion!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thagirion!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are... the doll Audra made?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are... the doll Audra made?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are... the doll Audra made?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To interfere with me in that tattered state. It seems your thought-spring must be broken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To interfere with me in that tattered state. It seems your thought-spring must be broken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To interfere with me in that tattered state. It seems your thought-spring must be broken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I am functioning normally. I am simply carrying out the purpose for which I was made.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I am functioning normally. I am simply carrying out the purpose for which I was made.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I am functioning normally. I am simply carrying out the purpose for which I was made.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet you let the intruders in, despite being made to protect the Promised Land, and still say that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet you let the intruders in, despite being made to protect the Promised Land, and still say that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet you let the intruders in, despite being made to protect the Promised Land, and still say that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What you are protecting...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What you are protecting...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What you are protecting...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is not the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is not the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is not the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: My heart...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My heart...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My heart...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's over, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's over, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's over, Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why... are you here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why... are you here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why... are you here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My heart... How could someone like you, who isn't even an Antagonist... reach it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My heart... How could someone like you, who isn't even an Antagonist... reach it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My heart... How could someone like you, who isn't even an Antagonist... reach it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not only Tammiel who can choose the Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not only Tammiel who can choose the Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not only Tammiel who can choose the Antagonist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The wishes gathered at the Golden Tree have acted as the Will of the World... and chosen the little queen as the new Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The wishes gathered at the Golden Tree have acted as the Will of the World... and chosen the little queen as the new Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The wishes gathered at the Golden Tree have acted as the Will of the World... and chosen the little queen as the new Antagonist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Samha...in...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Samha...in...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Samha...in...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have been preparing this revenge for a very long time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have been preparing this revenge for a very long time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have been preparing this revenge for a very long time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For as many years as you spent destroying countless worlds...
records.m_Talk_DEU: For as many years as you spent destroying countless worlds...
records.m_Talk_FRA: For as many years as you spent destroying countless worlds...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have crouched in hiding, holding my breath, waiting only for this moment when you would be most certain of victory and most careless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have crouched in hiding, holding my breath, waiting only for this moment when you would be most certain of victory and most careless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have crouched in hiding, holding my breath, waiting only for this moment when you would be most certain of victory and most careless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... the Golden Tree... How could you possibly...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... the Golden Tree... How could you possibly...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... the Golden Tree... How could you possibly...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I helped him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I helped him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I helped him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For using the Promised Land you created for me... like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For using the Promised Land you created for me... like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For using the Promised Land you created for me... like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Au... dra...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Au... dra...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Au... dra...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion is dying...? Like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion is dying...? Like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion is dying...? Like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's... happening?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's... happening?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's... happening?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh... at last...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh... at last...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh... at last...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The little queen has pierced Thagirion's heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The little queen has pierced Thagirion's heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The little queen has pierced Thagirion's heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that the prophecy has been fulfilled... the Promised Land will finally become complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the prophecy has been fulfilled... the Promised Land will finally become complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the prophecy has been fulfilled... the Promised Land will finally become complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The residents of the Promised Land... they're turning into light.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The residents of the Promised Land... they're turning into light.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The residents of the Promised Land... they're turning into light.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This energy...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This energy...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This energy...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss...! What is this?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss...! What is this?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss...! What is this?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The resentment of those who endured for nearly eternity, wishing for Thagirion's death... has finally been released.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The resentment of those who endured for nearly eternity, wishing for Thagirion's death... has finally been released.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The resentment of those who endured for nearly eternity, wishing for Thagirion's death... has finally been released.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss? What are you two talking about right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss? What are you two talking about right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss? What are you two talking about right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is that supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is that supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is that supposed to be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's what we coined as Alternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's what we coined as Alternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's what we coined as Alternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means that the pure crystallization of possibilities, possessing several times that power... is now being generated by the tens of millions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means that the pure crystallization of possibilities, possessing several times that power... is now being generated by the tens of millions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means that the pure crystallization of possibilities, possessing several times that power... is now being generated by the tens of millions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those lights... are crystallized possibilities stronger than Alternium?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those lights... are crystallized possibilities stronger than Alternium?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those lights... are crystallized possibilities stronger than Alternium?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless fates... are gathering into a single point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless fates... are gathering into a single point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless fates... are gathering into a single point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How... can one person be given that much power?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How... can one person be given that much power?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How... can one person be given that much power?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Audra said the Golden Tree was filling the emptiness of her fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Audra said the Golden Tree was filling the emptiness of her fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Audra said the Golden Tree was filling the emptiness of her fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, then she is the Will of the World once called the Promised Land itself. The wishes and prayers of all these residents were directed toward her from the very beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, then she is the Will of the World once called the Promised Land itself. The wishes and prayers of all these residents were directed toward her from the very beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, then she is the Will of the World once called the Promised Land itself. The wishes and prayers of all these residents were directed toward her from the very beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What they called a prophecy... was in fact an ancient plan finally coming to fruition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What they called a prophecy... was in fact an ancient plan finally coming to fruition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What they called a prophecy... was in fact an ancient plan finally coming to fruition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She herself is the Promised Land...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She herself is the Promised Land...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She herself is the Promised Land...

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Anapilis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Anapilis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Then Nicole is a fool...!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Then Nicole is a fool...!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Then Nicole is a fool...!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So she says.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So she says.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So she says.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Isn't that clumsy little sense of self-sacrifice just adorable?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Isn't that clumsy little sense of self-sacrifice just adorable?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Isn't that clumsy little sense of self-sacrifice just adorable?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You must not hesitate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You must not hesitate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You must not hesitate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you mistake the Demon Lord for your friend just because you spent a little time with her...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you mistake the Demon Lord for your friend just because you spent a little time with her...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you mistake the Demon Lord for your friend just because you spent a little time with her...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That mistake will return as a blade and pierce you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That mistake will return as a blade and pierce you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That mistake will return as a blade and pierce you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole... I'm sorry...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole... I'm sorry...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole... I'm sorry...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Momo will behave nicely...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Momo will behave nicely...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Momo will behave nicely...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get juice on my own...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get juice on my own...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get juice on my own...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please don't hate me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please don't hate me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please don't hate me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Demon Lord Thagirion...!!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Demon Lord Thagirion...!!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Demon Lord Thagirion...!!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Judgment!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Judgment!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Judgment!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pfft.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pfft.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pfft.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The bullet... missed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The bullet... missed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The bullet... missed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. That's not it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. That's not it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. That's not it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry... Momo.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry... Momo.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry... Momo.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't hate you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't hate you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't hate you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will stay with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will stay with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will stay with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that you don't get hurt and cry...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that you don't get hurt and cry...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that you don't get hurt and cry...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to protect you from now on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to protect you from now on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to protect you from now on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would you... hate me if I cried in front of you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would you... hate me if I cried in front of you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would you... hate me if I cried in front of you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll just... hold you tighter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll just... hold you tighter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll just... hold you tighter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To fall to your knees because of your emotions. You really are just like that woman.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To fall to your knees because of your emotions. You really are just like that woman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To fall to your knees because of your emotions. You really are just like that woman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose that's what fate is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose that's what fate is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose that's what fate is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well then... goodbye.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well then... goodbye.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well then... goodbye.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thagirion!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thagirion!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thagirion!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are... the doll Audra made?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are... the doll Audra made?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are... the doll Audra made?

root.m_Talk_ENG: To interfere with me in that tattered state. It seems your thought-spring must be broken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To interfere with me in that tattered state. It seems your thought-spring must be broken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To interfere with me in that tattered state. It seems your thought-spring must be broken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I am functioning normally. I am simply carrying out the purpose for which I was made.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I am functioning normally. I am simply carrying out the purpose for which I was made.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I am functioning normally. I am simply carrying out the purpose for which I was made.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And yet you let the intruders in, despite being made to protect the Promised Land, and still say that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And yet you let the intruders in, despite being made to protect the Promised Land, and still say that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And yet you let the intruders in, despite being made to protect the Promised Land, and still say that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you are protecting...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you are protecting...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you are protecting...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is not the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is not the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is not the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: My heart...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My heart...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My heart...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's over, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's over, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's over, Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why... are you here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why... are you here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why... are you here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My heart... How could someone like you, who isn't even an Antagonist... reach it...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My heart... How could someone like you, who isn't even an Antagonist... reach it...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My heart... How could someone like you, who isn't even an Antagonist... reach it...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not only Tammiel who can choose the Antagonist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not only Tammiel who can choose the Antagonist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not only Tammiel who can choose the Antagonist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The wishes gathered at the Golden Tree have acted as the Will of the World... and chosen the little queen as the new Antagonist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The wishes gathered at the Golden Tree have acted as the Will of the World... and chosen the little queen as the new Antagonist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The wishes gathered at the Golden Tree have acted as the Will of the World... and chosen the little queen as the new Antagonist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Samha...in...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Samha...in...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Samha...in...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have been preparing this revenge for a very long time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have been preparing this revenge for a very long time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have been preparing this revenge for a very long time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For as many years as you spent destroying countless worlds...
root.m_Talk_DEU: For as many years as you spent destroying countless worlds...
root.m_Talk_FRA: For as many years as you spent destroying countless worlds...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have crouched in hiding, holding my breath, waiting only for this moment when you would be most certain of victory and most careless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have crouched in hiding, holding my breath, waiting only for this moment when you would be most certain of victory and most careless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have crouched in hiding, holding my breath, waiting only for this moment when you would be most certain of victory and most careless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... the Golden Tree... How could you possibly...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... the Golden Tree... How could you possibly...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... the Golden Tree... How could you possibly...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I helped him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I helped him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I helped him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For using the Promised Land you created for me... like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For using the Promised Land you created for me... like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For using the Promised Land you created for me... like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Au... dra...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Au... dra...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Au... dra...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion is dying...? Like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion is dying...? Like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion is dying...? Like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's... happening?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's... happening?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's... happening?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh... at last...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh... at last...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh... at last...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The little queen has pierced Thagirion's heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The little queen has pierced Thagirion's heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The little queen has pierced Thagirion's heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that the prophecy has been fulfilled... the Promised Land will finally become complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the prophecy has been fulfilled... the Promised Land will finally become complete.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the prophecy has been fulfilled... the Promised Land will finally become complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The residents of the Promised Land... they're turning into light.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The residents of the Promised Land... they're turning into light.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The residents of the Promised Land... they're turning into light.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This energy...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This energy...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This energy...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boss...! What is this?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boss...! What is this?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boss...! What is this?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The resentment of those who endured for nearly eternity, wishing for Thagirion's death... has finally been released.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The resentment of those who endured for nearly eternity, wishing for Thagirion's death... has finally been released.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The resentment of those who endured for nearly eternity, wishing for Thagirion's death... has finally been released.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boss? What are you two talking about right now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boss? What are you two talking about right now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boss? What are you two talking about right now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is that supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is that supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is that supposed to be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's what we coined as Alternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's what we coined as Alternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's what we coined as Alternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It means that the pure crystallization of possibilities, possessing several times that power... is now being generated by the tens of millions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It means that the pure crystallization of possibilities, possessing several times that power... is now being generated by the tens of millions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It means that the pure crystallization of possibilities, possessing several times that power... is now being generated by the tens of millions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those lights... are crystallized possibilities stronger than Alternium?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those lights... are crystallized possibilities stronger than Alternium?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those lights... are crystallized possibilities stronger than Alternium?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless fates... are gathering into a single point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless fates... are gathering into a single point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless fates... are gathering into a single point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How... can one person be given that much power?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How... can one person be given that much power?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How... can one person be given that much power?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Audra said the Golden Tree was filling the emptiness of her fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Audra said the Golden Tree was filling the emptiness of her fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Audra said the Golden Tree was filling the emptiness of her fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, then she is the Will of the World once called the Promised Land itself. The wishes and prayers of all these residents were directed toward her from the very beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, then she is the Will of the World once called the Promised Land itself. The wishes and prayers of all these residents were directed toward her from the very beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, then she is the Will of the World once called the Promised Land itself. The wishes and prayers of all these residents were directed toward her from the very beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What they called a prophecy... was in fact an ancient plan finally coming to fruition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What they called a prophecy... was in fact an ancient plan finally coming to fruition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What they called a prophecy... was in fact an ancient plan finally coming to fruition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She herself is the Promised Land...
root.m_Talk_DEU: She herself is the Promised Land...
root.m_Talk_FRA: She herself is the Promised Land...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Anapilis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Anapilis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Anapilis.
